_description: Maps viplevel (0–18) to cohort label for spending segmentation.
_rationale: VIP 12 cutoff chosen because avg lifetime spend doubles from VIP11 (16M VND) to VIP12 (34.7M VND) — a natural breakpoint.
sql_case: CASE WHEN viplevel >= 12 THEN 'whale' WHEN viplevel >= 7 THEN 'dolphin' ELSE 'minnow' END AS cohort
notes: viplevel is taken directly from moneychange_reduce/add rows — no join needed.
viplevel is a proxy for lifetime spend. Actual cohort may differ for new whales still leveling VIP.
A player's cohort for a given day is their viplevel AT THE TIME of the transaction, not a fixed historical assignment.
